prompt: A vertical cyberpunk promotional poster for a custom sci-fi display typeface, set in a neon-drenched future city at sunset. The composition is dominated at the top by huge metallic 3D title text reading AI 超世代, with the English letters "AI" above the Chinese characters, all rendered in a heavy steel mecha-style black font with beveled edges, chrome reflections, deep gunmetal surfaces, electric blue inner glow, cyan rim lighting, and sharp industrial geometry. Below the title, in the foreground, a cute chibi robot mascot stands heroically in the center, white armored body with black joints, glossy black digital face screen, bright cyan glowing eyes with one eye winking, open smiling mouth, gold headphone-like ear discs, and a glowing triangular chest emblem, raising one fist triumphantly while stepping forward. Surrounding it are 6 supporting robot characters and drones: 1 cat-eared chibi robot at bottom left with pink paw pads and joyful glowing face, 1 rabbit-eared chibi robot at bottom right running forward, 1 boxy utility robot vehicle at far bottom right with a small digital face, 1 spherical drone at upper left, 1 spherical drone at upper right, and 1 larger flying robot at mid-left. The background is a dense futuristic city canyon with tall skyscrapers on both sides, elevated roads, holographic billboards, glowing signage, and atmospheric perspective fading into the bright center. Include 3 clearly visible billboard screens: 1 pink neon cat-themed billboard on the left, 1 blue holographic robot schematic billboard on the upper right, and 1 purple neon billboard on the lower right. The street is glossy and reflective with luminous circuit-like lane markings and cyan-magenta light streaks. Use a dramatic low-angle perspective, centered symmetrical poster layout, high contrast, vibrant cyan, magenta, purple, orange, and gold lighting, polished anime-meets-3D illustration style, cinematic sunset clouds, energetic, playful, futuristic, adorable yet epic tech-branding aesthetic.
